summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DREAMOVEN Inventory App role-based access control. All features working correctly: Admin login, Kitchen login, role-based sidebar navigation, GRN page with PO search and vendor dropdown, Requisitions page with role-specific views. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified.
passed_tests: API health endpoint returns healthy status
Admin login with correct credentials (parveenkatyal2312@gmail.com / admin@123)
Admin can access protected routes (/api/auth/me)
Kitchen login with correct credentials (srpb@dreamoven.com / kitchen@123)
Kitchen can access requisitions API
Invalid password correctly rejected with 401
Non-existent email correctly rejected with 401
Items API returns 797 items (as expected)
Vendors API returns 69 vendors (as expected)
Locations API returns 15 locations (as expected)
Dashboard stats returns all required fields (total_lots, total_items, total_locations, expiring_soon_count)
GRN list endpoint works correctly
Purchase orders endpoint works for GRN workflow
Admin can see all requisitions
Kitchen user sees only their requisitions
UI: Admin login flow works correctly
UI: Admin sees full sidebar (Dashboard, Auto POs, PO, GRN, Requisitions, Issue, Daily Perishables, Current Stock, Alerts, Inventory, Items, Vendors, Reports, Scan QR, Users)
UI: Admin Requisitions page shows 'Manage kitchen requisitions'
UI: GRN page has Quick Search by PO number
UI: GRN page has vendor dropdown to browse POs
UI: Kitchen login flow works correctly
UI: Kitchen user sees limited sidebar (My Requisitions, Purchase Orders, Receive Goods, Scan QR)
UI: Kitchen user is redirected to /requisitions after login
UI: Kitchen Requisitions page shows 'Request items from Main Store'
UI: Kitchen Requisitions page has 'New Request' button
UI: Admin-only items (Dashboard, Issue, Current Stock, Users) are correctly hidden from kitchen user
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing migrated data (797 items, 69 vendors, 15 locations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full codebase migration from Kinfolk Store completed and verified. Role-based access control working correctly: 1) Admin sees full sidebar with all 15+ menu items, 2) Kitchen user sees limited sidebar with 4 items (My Requisitions, Purchase Orders, Receive Goods, Scan QR), 3) Admin Requisitions shows 'Manage kitchen requisitions', 4) Kitchen Requisitions shows 'Request items from Main Store' with New Request button, 5) GRN page has Quick Search by PO number and vendor dropdown, 6) Dashboard shows stats (Active Lots, Total Items=797, Locations=15, Expiring Soon). Data preserved from migration: 797 items, 69 vendors, 15 locations.
